title: Signature and known-library baseline
purpose: Reduce triage noise by recognizing common runtime/library patterns and lowering priority for likely boilerplate.
actions: Define first-party signature records for runtime/library indicators
Attach signature labels to objects or radar inputs
Document that this is not IDA FLIRT parity
Add fixture tests for recognized and unknown patterns

criteria: Known-library hits are visible as confidence metadata
Risk scoring remains conservative for dangerous imports
Tests verify boilerplate does not dominate top radar rows
